description: Value for money, the lotto Stadio firm ground football boot is a great footwear for beginners. Replete with water repellent and impact protection features, the Stadio allows your feet to flex perfectly, offering great elastic return of energy.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper to keep your boots in the best shape Mesh lining on the collar and below the synthetic tongue for durability and breathability Knitted lace-uo system for extended durability and snug Fit Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for all day in-step comfort EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Rearfoot shock-off feature to cushion the foot during a hard round of hard ground football Multi-directional pattern on the outsole for great grip and traction Pivot point on the big toe mound for flexible 180 degree movement of the forefoot shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
